name: Invisible Whip of the Spider Demon

system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Grapple against Evade
Type: Normal
Qi: 3

You lash or snap out with your silks or ropes with the intent to trip and delay opponents. Make a Grapple Skill roll against your opponent’s Evade. On a success you entangle and/or trip the target for one round, requiring them to make an Athletics roll against your original Attack roll result in order to move. On a Total Success this effect lasts two rounds. If they fail their Athletics they cannot move that round. This lashes out in a 10 by 30 foot cone per Rank of Waijia. Cathartic: This increases the cone area to 20 by 60 feet per Rank of Waijia. In addition the silk or ropes move so fast they are nearly invisible. Affected targets must make a Detect TN 6 roll or suffer a -3 to Evade and -3d10 to Athletics (against this attack and its effects).
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetEffects: Entangled or tripped for 1 round; Athletics against original attack result to move
system.totalSuccessTargetEffects: Entangled or tripped for 2 rounds; Athletics against original attack result to move
system.catharticTargetEffects: As normal, larger area; targets must Detect TN 6 or suffer Evade -3 and Athletics -3d10 against this attack/effect
system.catharticEffect: This increases the cone area to 20 by 60 feet per Rank of Waijia. In addition the silk or ropes move so fast they are nearly invisible. Affected targets must make a Detect TN 6 roll or suffer a -3 to Evade and -3d10 to Athletics (against this attack and its effects).
